title: How to Actually Build Mobile Apps with AI in 2026 | A Complete Beginner's Tutorial
summary: JavaScript Mastery published a video tutorial on building a Duolingo clone mobile app using AI agents and "Practical Vibe Coding" workflow. The approach uses AI to enable building production apps rapidly in a weekend without hand-written code, with integration of Vision Agents, Clerk authentication, PostHog analytics, and CodeRabbit for code review.
